items.title: Men disguised as police kill Ecuadorean drug lord's brother
items.dek: The victim, David Macías, was the brother of drug lord 'El Fito', who is awaiting trial in the US.
items.body: The victim, David Macías, was the brother of drug lord 'El Fito', who is awaiting trial in the US.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: People flee Bangkok bar as huge flames shoot out from doorway
items.dek: At least 27 people have died and 25 are critically injured after a fire tore through a bar in a popular Bangkok district.
items.body: At least 27 people have died and 25 are critically injured after a fire tore through a bar in a popular Bangkok district.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Senator Lindsey Graham died of aortic tear, examiner says
items.dek: Graham, a close Republican ally of Donald Trump, died at the age of 71 on Saturday evening.
items.body: Graham, a close Republican ally of Donald Trump, died at the age of 71 on Saturday evening.
items.author: IriLine Desk
